being always subject to the terms, rights, defences, provisions, conditions, exceptions,limitations, and liberties hereof (INCLUDING ALL THOSE TERMS
AND CONDITIONS ON THE REVERSE HEREOF NUMBERED 1-26 AND THOSE TERMS AND CONDITIONS CONTAINED IN THE CARRIER'S APPLICABLE
TARIFF) and the Merchant's attention is drawn in particular to the Carrier's liberties in respect of on deck stowage (see clause 18) and the carrying
vessel (see clause 19). Where the bill of lading is non-negotiable the Carrier may give delivery of the Goods to the named consignee upon reasonable
proof of identity and without requiring surrender of an original bill of lading. Where the bill of lading is negotiable, the Merchant is obliged to surrender
one original, duly endorsed, in exchange for the Goods. The Carrier accepts a duty of reasonable care to check that any such document which the
Merchant surrenders as a bill of lading is genuine and original. If the Carrier complies with this duty, it will be entitled to deliver the Goods against what
it reasonably believes to be a genuine and original bill of lading, such delivery discharging the Carrier’s delivery obligations. In accepting this bill of
lading, any local customs or privileges to the contrary notwithstanding, the Merchant agrees to be bound by all Terms and Conditions stated herein
whether written, printed,stamped or incorporated on the face or reverse side hereof, as fully as if they were all signed by the Merchant.
IN WITNESS WHEREOF the number of original Bills of Lading stated on this side have been signed and wherever one original Bill of Lading has been
surrendered any others shall be void.

Demurrage and Detention deals are based on the Price Calculation Date of your shipments.
Note that these demurrage and detention conditions shall not apply if the

which are available at the carriers website at
https://terms.sealandmaersk.com/americas/terms-spot-booking and which shall supersede
any separately agreed terms. In case of doubts, please check with the Shipper or local
agents the modality of booking/shipment that was hired.
Notwithstanding any provision to the contrary, the Merchant agrees the Goods are
considered formal delivery after the effective discharge at a port in Brazil, to any port
authority/terminal at such port and all liability of the Carrier whatsoever in connection with
the goods (including without limitation for misdelivery) shall cease at that time. The Carrier
shall not be responsible for delivery of cargo without presentation of the Original Bill of
Lading as per Brazilian Customs Regulations.
Shipper assumes before the shipowner the contractual and legal duty to export/ship their
cargo to a Consignee who has real interest and conditions in acquiring/receiving the
imported cargo, promoting its effective removal at the destination, with the fulfillment of all
obligations inherent to this act. If the cargo is abandoned at its destination or if it is not
removed by the Consignee for any reason, the Shipper will be jointly and severally liable,
together with the Consignee, for all amounts, cost, expense, damage or loss that carrier
may suffer as a result of this situation.

comparaciones.label: Booking (instrucciones)
comparaciones.nota: El BA indica DESTINO y el BL no trae el (10A) — verificar

notas: Fixture del caso real A.3 (docs/plans/PLAN-INPUT-FABLE_pedidos_2026-07-16.md, seccion A.3; evidencia previa en docs/explore/EXPLORE_A3_MAERSK_10A_2026-07-16.md). Ejecucion WVt6gvghL2nFVbt6 #33231, orden 118833340, BL 272414937, MAERSK FREEPORT 628N, status success (fetched via n8n-cli executions get 33231 --mode full --json, read-only). comparador_input_item = item COMPLETO y VERBATIM que entra al nodo 'COMPARADOR - BL vs Aduana vs Booking' (= output.json del nodo upstream 'Merge 4 (+ PE)', el ultimo Merge antes del comparador; el propio comparador hace `const doc = current.json`). NO se recorto nada: no hay binarios/base64 en el item (item.binary = {} en el runData), y el campo mas grande (`text`, ~9.9KB, texto crudo del PDF de PE) no califica como 'masivo/binario' segun la instruccion de recorte, asi que se dejo intacto junto con el resto (info/metadata/pe_extract/factura_extract/etc.) para fidelidad total. Puntos clave para el fix de A.3, ya verificados en este item real: comparador_input_item.carrier_code = 'MAERSK'; comparador_input_item.login_extract.originals_to_be_released_at = null (el hardcode de 'Inyectar metadata (MAERSK)' linea 346 — bl.originals_to_be_released_at SIEMPRE null para Maersk, causa raiz del falso REVISAR); comparador_input_item.booking_extract.originals_release = {value:'DESTINO', conflict:false, matches:1} (el BA SI declara release point via regex, sin IA, en 'Inyectar links + order (Booking)'); comparador_input_item.aduana_extract incluido completo (operacion/buque/destino coinciden con el caso: buque MAERSK FREEPORT/628N vs BL 'MAERSK FREEPORT 628N' — el (14) VESSEL VOYAGE es informativo-siempre por diseño, no bloquea). comparador_output_10a = el objeto campos[] con num='10A' tal como lo emite hoy el comparador: estado REVISAR, comparaciones[0].nota = 'El BA indica DESTINO y el BL no trae el (10A) — verificar' — el falso positivo exacto reportado por John. Ningun otro documento del BL de este mismo caso (login_extract) trae valor de originals_to_be_released_at porque el extractor Maersk nunca lo captura (Schema MAERSK no tiene ese campo); el BL real es 'NON-NEGOTIABLE WAYBILL' (liberacion electronica, 10A vacio correcto) segun la regla de dominio de John en el plan — dato NO verificable desde runData (el extractor no captura tipo de documento/titulo del BL), asi que el fixture no puede probarlo por si solo; queda como dato de negocio a confirmar contra el PDF original si hiciera falta para el fix. Barrido de verificacion: se escanearon las 208 ejecuciones existentes de WVt6gvghL2nFVbt6 (n8n-cli executions list --limit 250, total=208, hasMore=false) en modo filtered buscando '118833340' — 33231 fue la UNICA ejecucion que matcheo (sin retries/duplicados).
